identity.core_philosophy: Digital Pop-up Book. Tactile, bouncy, and forgiving.

grid_system.home: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-8 p-8 h-full place-items-stretch
grid_system.letters: grid grid-cols-3 md:grid-cols-5 gap-4 md:gap-6 p-4
grid_system.words: flex flex-col gap-8 p-4 md:p-8 max-w-4xl mx-auto

HomeCard.style: rounded-3xl shadow-xl flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-4 transition-all hover:scale-105 active:scale-95 border-4 border-white/20 backdrop-blur-sm
HomeCard.motion: Apply slight floating animation using framer-motion

LetterTile.style: aspect-square rounded-2xl bg-white shadow-lg flex items-center justify-center text-6xl md:text-8xl text-primary font-telugu border-b-8 border-gray-100 active:border-b-0 active:translate-y-2
LetterTile.interaction: Plays audio on tap. Animate scale on tap.

WordCard.style: w-full aspect-[4/3] rounded-3xl bg-white shadow-xl overflow-hidden relative group border-4 border-transparent hover:border-secondary transition-all
WordCard.image_style: w-full h-full object-cover transform group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform duration-500

ParentGate.modal_style: bg-white rounded-3xl p-8 border-4 border-gray-200 max-w-md w-full

instructions_to_main_agent: THEME: Force Light Mode. Do not implement Dark Mode toggle for toddlers.
NAVIGATION: Use a persistent 'Home' button (House Icon) in the top-left corner of every inner page.
AUDIO: Use 'window.speechSynthesis' for Text-to-Speech (Telugu 'te-IN' voice if available, else fallback).
INTERACTION: Add 'cursor-pointer' to all interactive elements. Ensure tap targets are HUGE.
MOTION: Use <AnimatePresence> for page transitions. Make everything bounce slightly on entrance.
universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts. Use asymmetrical 'bento' grids where possible, but keep it simple for kids.
Create depth through layered design elements (shadows, borders).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (transition: all).
You MUST NOT center align the app container text-align globally.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Subtle grain textures or noise overlays can add a 'paper' feel (optional).
